title: Vanilla Plus Machines
description: This mod adds some basic Machines, which are Vanilla style Friendly.
body:
## Created with MCreator
![VPM Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5d9c48481d27f0f88827ed437b4b37cef6f5008.jpeg)

# This Mod adds some Basic and Vanilla friendly Machines

![Picture of the Machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0920fe921ba3b30958ab90b44ef6d9e5becfdf65_0.webp)

## Observer Piston
This block watches in front and back for Kelp, Cactus, Bamboo and Sugarcane and cuts it off. You can also observe one Block above

## Babysorter
This block seperates the Babies from Adults
Pig, Cow

## Concrete Mixer
This Block can be filled with a Bucket of Water
Then you can Rightclick with Concretepowder and receive solid Concrete.

## Tripple Furnace
Basicly that what it sounds like. Burnspeed like an normal Furnace but have 3 Slots.
Saves the generated XP and you can get them by clicking on an Button

## Trim for Coated Ironpickaxe and Shovel
You can coat your shovel and pickaxe with copper to make it better (none are better then diamond)
and you can coat your pickaxe with diamond. You need to craft Trims to do this in the Smithing table.

Also Achievements are in this mod!

Feel free to use it in any Modpack
